# Solytics GmbH

> E-invoicing compliance and AI automation for German SMEs. Bavarian GmbH.

## Services

### E-Rechnung (E-Invoicing)
E-invoicing compliance for German businesses. XRechnung, ZUGFeRD. B2B mandatory from January 2027.
- Compliance Check: 1,500 EUR, 1 week
- Implementation: 5,000 EUR, 2-3 weeks
- Full Migration: custom pricing
URL: https://solytics.de/e-rechnung
Landing Page: https://solytics.de/lp/e-rechnung

### KI-Automatisierung (AI Automation)
AI agents for business process automation. Reports, approvals, data reconciliation, status updates.
- Workshop: 2,500 EUR, 2-3 days
- Agent Setup: 5,000 EUR, 30 days
- Retainer: 2,000 EUR/month
URL: https://solytics.de/ki-automatisierung
Landing Page: https://solytics.de/lp/ki-automatisierung

### Website-Redesign
Professional website redesign for SMEs. We write the copy. Fixed price.
- Kompakt (5-10 pages): 5,000 EUR, 4 weeks
- Mittelstand (10-20 pages): 10,000 EUR, 6 weeks
- Komplett: custom pricing
URL: https://solytics.de/website-redesign
Landing Page: https://solytics.de/lp/website-redesign

## Digitalbonus Bayern
Both services qualify for 50% state subsidy (up to 7,500 EUR). Expires end of 2027.
URL: https://solytics.de/digitalbonus

## Blog
29 articles covering e-invoicing compliance and AI automation for German SMEs.
URL: https://solytics.de/blog
Categories: E-Rechnung, KI-Automatisierung

- E-Rechnung Pflicht-Check: https://solytics.de/e-rechnung/pflicht-check
- KI Readiness Check: https://solytics.de/ki-automatisierung/readiness-check
